title: Are Tankers Bound To Take A Breather Or Will The Party Continue Post Posidonia
section_path: Are Tankers Bound To Take A Breather Or Will The Party Continue Post Posidonia
section_path_text: Are Tankers Bound To Take A Breather Or Will The Party Continue Post Posidonia
summary:
Main
As Posidonia 2024 kicks-off and we approach the second half of the year, we examine key trends that have influenced the tanker markets and draw conclusions about the future from Vortexa flows, freight and inventory datasets. By Ioannis Papadimitriou
The summer season is upon us, and the shipping community celebrates by gathering at Posidonia after a turbulent first half of the year. This turbulence looks to have left shipowners and ship operators largely net-positive when looking at freight rates.
